attributes.Sql Query:
select 
BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE            
,RU_BK_RECLASS_DEPARTMENT_CODE 
,BK_COMPANY_CODE               
,FINANCIAL_DEPT_NAME           
,FINANCIAL_DEPT_ENABLED_FLAG   
,FINANCIAL_DEPT_START_DATE     
,FINANCIAL_DEPT_END_DATE       
,REQUISITION_THRESHOLD_AMOUNT  
,ESTIMATED_BUDGET_AMOUNT       
,ESTIMATED_HEAD_COUNT          
,FIN_DEPT_USAGE_DESCRIPTION    
,RECLASS_ROLE                  
,BK_BUDGET_CURRENCY_CODE       
,BK_FINANCIAL_TAX_CATEGORY_ID  
,BK_FUNCTIONAL_UNIT_ID         
,BK_FINANCIAL_MARKET_LOB_ID    
,BK_FINANCIAL_SALES_REGION_ID  
,BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE    
,ISO_COUNTRY_CODE              
,BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID           
,CFP_MANAGER_PARTY_KEY         
,FINANCIAL_ANALYST_PARTY_KEY   
,PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_KEY         
,HR_DEPARTMENT_ROLE            
,CONTROLLER_PARTY_KEY          
,DEPARTMENT_MANAGER_PARTY_KEY  
,MANAGEMENT_HIER_NODE_NM_KEY   
,RECLASS_DT                    
,BK_FD_ALTERNATE_HIERARCHY_ID  
,RU_BK_RECLASS_COMPANY_CODE    
,MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_NAME
,SK_DEPT_NO_NUM                
,EDW_CREATE_DTM                
,EDW_CREATE_USER               
,EDW_UPDATE_DTM                
,EDW_UPDATE_USER               
,START_TV_DT                   
,END_TV_DT                     
from  $$WORKDB.W_AH_FINANCIAL_DEPT_H1  WFA
where 
(WFA.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE,WFA.BK_COMPANY_CODE) 
NOT IN 
(SELECT NFD.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE,NFD.BK_COMPANY_CODE 
  FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AH_FINANCIAL_DEPT_H1_TV NFD)

select 
BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE,
RU_BK_RECLASS_DEPARTMENT_CODE,
BK_COMPANY_CODE,
FINANCIAL_DEPT_NAME,
FINANCIAL_DEPT_ENABLED_FLAG,
FINANCIAL_DEPT_START_DATE,
FINANCIAL_DEPT_END_DATE,
REQUISITION_THRESHOLD_AMOUNT,
ESTIMATED_BUDGET_AMOUNT,
ESTIMATED_HEAD_COUNT,
FIN_DEPT_USAGE_DESCRIPTION,
RECLASS_ROLE,
BK_BUDGET_CURRENCY_CODE,
BK_FINANCIAL_TAX_CATEGORY_ID,
BK_FUNCTIONAL_UNIT_ID,
BK_FINANCIAL_MARKET_LOB_ID,
BK_FINANCIAL_SALES_REGION_ID,
BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE,
ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID,
CFP_MANAGER_PARTY_KEY,
FINANCIAL_ANALYST_PARTY_KEY,
PL_HIERARCHY_NODE_KEY,
HR_DEPARTMENT_ROLE,
CONTROLLER_PARTY_KEY,
DEPARTMENT_MANAGER_PARTY_KEY,
MANAGEMENT_HIER_NODE_NM_KEY,
RECLASS_DT,
BK_FD_ALTERNATE_HIERARCHY_ID,
RU_BK_RECLASS_COMPANY_CODE,
MANAGEMENT_HIERARCHY_NODE_NAME,
SK_DEPT_NO_NUM,
EDW_CREATE_DTM,
EDW_CREATE_USER,
EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
EDW_UPDATE_USER
from
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_AH_FINANCIAL_DEPT_H1_TV
where END_TV_DT ='3500-01-01'
